lifecycle.operator_decision_summary: Operator 2026-07-02 ordered per-MT drift spot-checks with adversarial sub-agent review; no MT has been validated by an official validator. Wave-B audit: embed-back leg orphaned in the live shell - (1) enabled Embed-Stage-Capture palette row has NO dispatch arm (falls to warn+false silent no-op, contradicting the catalog comment); (2) register_embed_stage_capture_command called only in tests; (3) StagePane::show_round_trip (the surface with the embed-back button) renders only via a dock mount no code ever opens - live bottom panel uses the button-less MT-033 show(); (4) stage_embed_requested drain is just request_repaint. EmbedBackEndpointAbsent can never surface to an operator. Also two forked StagePane instances (live bottom panel vs never-opened dock) - share one Arc<Mutex<StagePane>>. proofs claim bidirectional visually verified but the screenshot is a fixture render of a surface the shell never mounts. Route leg IS live (app.rs:6684 drain) and stays.

scope.summary:
Goal: implement the bidirectional editors <-> Stage (Pillar 17) interop edge. Today MT-033 only routes a Common Knowledge Component (CKC) reference one way (editors -> Stage). This MT proves a full Stage round-trip: (1) a 'Route to Stage' command that sends a note, a text selection, or a canvas node from any editor pane to a Stage pane via the EXISTING handshake_core Stage route API, and (2) an embed-back path that takes a Stage capture artifact — together with its SHA-256 manifest provenance — and inserts it into a note or canvas as an MT-014 embed NodeView. There is NO backend build in this MT: bind only existing handshake_core endpoints; if the Stage embed-back retrieval endpoint is absent, raise a typed blocker (do not stub, do not add a backend route).

The expected diff shape is: (a) one new Rust module src/frontend/handshake_native/src/interop/stage_interop.rs (~300-450 lines) defining the route-to-Stage payload builders, the Stage round-trip client wrappers over the existing handshake_core HTTP API, and the embed-back -> NodeView conversion; (b) a new pane module src/frontend/handshake_native/src/stage_pane.rs (~200-350 lines) that hosts the Stage surface inside the egui shell, registers into the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs), receives routed content, and exposes a 'Capture -> Embed back' action; (c) integration tests proving the payload shape, the FR event emission, the round-trip against a REAL PostgreSQL/EventLedger, and the typed-blocker path.

Files to CREATE:
  - src/frontend/handshake_native/src/interop/stage_interop.rs
      * StageRouteSource enum: NoteRef { workspace_id, note_id } | Selection { workspace_id, source_pane_id, text, source_ref } | CanvasNode { workspace_id, canvas_id, node_id, node_kind }.
      * struct StageRoutePayload { workspace_id: String, source: StageRouteSource, target_stage_pane: Option<PaneId>, correlation_id: String } with fn build_from_selection(sel: &SharedSelection) -> Result<StageRoutePayload, StageInteropError> and fn build_from_canvas_node(node: &CanvasNodeRef) -> Result<StageRoutePayload, StageInteropError>. These build the payload deterministically; build_from_selection reads the shared selection state published on the WP-011 shared command/event bus (command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs) (TextRange / BlockRef / NodeRef variants).
      * fn route_to_stage(client: &HandshakeClient, payload: &StageRoutePayload) -> Result<RouteAck, StageInteropError> that POSTs to the EXISTING endpoint POST /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/route and, on success, emits the route_to_stage Flight-Recorder (FR) event defined in MT-036 via the FR event bus (do NOT invent a new event name; reuse MT-036's route_to_stage emitter).
      * struct StageArtifactRef { artifact_id: String, workspace_id: String, sha256: String, manifest: StageManifest } and fn fetch_stage_artifact(client: &HandshakeClient, workspace_id: &str, artifact_id: &str) -> Result<StageArtifactRef, StageInteropError> that GETs the EXISTING endpoint GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/artifacts/{id}. If the client returns 404 / 501 / not-implemented OR the route is not registered in the bound handshake_core API surface, return StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent (the typed blocker) — do not fabricate the artifact.
      * fn embed_artifact_as_nodeview(artifact: &StageArtifactRef) -> Result<EmbedNodeView, StageInteropError> that converts a fetched Stage artifact into an MT-014 embed NodeView (reuse MT-014's EmbedNodeView / embed-block type; do not define a parallel embed type). The NodeView MUST carry the artifact's SHA-256 and a provenance descriptor { source: "stage_capture", artifact_id, sha256, manifest_ref } so evidence-grade provenance survives the embed.
      * StageInteropError enum: BadSelection | EmptyPayload | RouteRejected { status: u16 } | EmbedBackEndpointAbsent | ProvenanceMissing | Transport(String).
  - src/frontend/handshake_native/src/stage_pane.rs
      * struct StagePane { pane_id: PaneId, workspace_id: String, ... } implementing the WP-011 pane trait; registers into the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs) and the AccessKit id registry (accessibility/registry.rs) with stable author_id "stage-pane" (Role::GenericContainer) and child action button author_id "stage-capture-embed-back" (Role::Button, actions=[Press]).
      * fn receive_routed_content(&mut self, payload: &StageRoutePayload): renders the routed note/selection/canvas-node inside the Stage surface (port the visual surface from the React Stage components + MediaDownloaderView capture/import reference).
      * fn capture_and_embed_back(&mut self, client: &HandshakeClient, target: EmbedTarget) -> Result<(), StageInteropError>: calls fetch_stage_artifact then embed_artifact_as_nodeview then inserts the EmbedNodeView into the target note or canvas (target = note pane or canvas pane resolved via the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs) / shared bus focus owner (event_bus.rs)).

Files to EDIT:
  - src/frontend/handshake_native/src/lib.rs  — add `pub mod stage_pane;` and `pub mod interop;` (and, inside interop, `pub mod stage_interop;`); if interop/ does not yet exist, create src/frontend/handshake_native/src/interop/mod.rs declaring `pub mod stage_interop;`.
  - src/frontend/handshake_native/src/pane_registry.rs  — register StagePane in the pane factory.
  - src/frontend/handshake_native/src/command_registry.rs  — register the 'Route to Stage' command (id "route-to-stage", label "Route to Stage", default keybind Ctrl+Shift+S or OS-appropriate) whose handler calls stage_interop::route_to_stage on the current shared selection / focused canvas node, and register the 'Embed Stage Capture' command (id "embed-stage-capture") on the Stage pane. Do NOT duplicate MT-033's existing CKC route-to-Stage command; this MT EXTENDS it into a proven round-trip (reuse MT-033's command surface and add the embed-back leg).

Step-by-step implementation notes:
  1. Reuse, do not reinvent: the route-to-Stage one-way path already exists from MT-033 (CKC route-to-Stage). Wire route_to_stage() to the SAME existing POST /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/route endpoint MT-033 uses; this MT adds (a) selection + canvas-node payload builders and (b) the embed-back return leg.
  2. Payload builders read selection state from the WP-011 shared command/event bus (command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs) (depends_on is satisfied transitively through MT-033 which depends on MT-031); build_from_selection maps SharedSelection::TextRange -> Selection source, ::BlockRef -> NoteRef, ::NodeRef -> CanvasNode.
  3. On a successful POST, emit MT-036's route_to_stage FR event via the existing FR event bus so the round-trip is observable in the Flight-Recorder timeline. Use MT-036's emitter signature exactly; do not add a new event kind.
  4. The embed-back leg: GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/artifacts/{id}. Bind via the existing HandshakeClient (backend_client.rs). If the endpoint is missing from the bound handshake_core surface (route absent, 404/501, or client method does not exist), return StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent and surface it to the operator as a typed blocker — this is the HARD no-backend-rewrite rule: gaps are typed blockers, never new backend routes.
  5. Convert the fetched artifact to an MT-014 embed NodeView (reuse MT-014's embed-block / NodeView type). The NodeView MUST preserve SHA-256 manifest provenance; if the fetched artifact has no sha256 or manifest, return StageInteropError::ProvenanceMissing rather than embedding an unverifiable artifact.
  6. Insert the EmbedNodeView into the target note (rich-text pane document model) or canvas (canvas pane node graph, canvas_board.rs) resolved through the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs) and the shared bus focus owner (event_bus.rs).
  7. AccessKit: register "stage-pane" (GenericContainer), "stage-capture-embed-back" (Button), and the routed-content region "stage-routed-content" (GenericContainer) into the WP-011 AccessKit id registry (accessibility/registry.rs) so swarm agents can drive the round-trip.
  8. HARD constraints: PostgreSQL/EventLedger only — no SQLite anywhere; no backend rewrite (bind existing handshake_core APIs via backend_client.rs, gaps are typed blockers); egui+AccessKit native; reuse WP-011 shell primitives (pane_registry.rs, command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs, accessibility/registry.rs).

Dependencies / unblock conditions:
  - MT-014 (embed NodeView / embed-block type) must be merged — embed-back reuses its NodeView.
  - MT-033 (CKC route-to-Stage one-way command) must be merged — this MT extends it.
  - MT-036 (Flight-Recorder route_to_stage event) must be merged — route_to_stage() emits its event.
  - Cross-WP: the WP-011 shell primitives (pane_registry.rs, command_registry.rs, event_bus.rs, accessibility/registry.rs, backend_client.rs) must already exist in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/; this MT reuses them and does not recreate them.

Risk if missed: the Stage creative-capture edge stays one-directional (CKC -> Stage only); evidence-grade captures (with SHA-256 manifest provenance) cannot flow back into notes or canvas, breaking the closed-loop creative+evidence workflow that Pillar 17 promises.
acceptance_criteria: AC-001: route_to_stage builds the correct StageRoutePayload from a SharedSelection (TextRange) and from a canvas node — proven by cargo test asserting the serialized payload shape (workspace_id, source variant, correlation_id) matches the existing POST /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/route contract.

AC-002: Integration test against a REAL PostgreSQL/EventLedger: routing to Stage emits the MT-036 route_to_stage Flight-Recorder event AND the Stage pane's receive_routed_content renders the routed content — proven by reading the FR event from the ledger and asserting the pane state.

AC-003: embed-back inserts a fetched Stage artifact as an MT-014 embed NodeView carrying SHA-256 manifest provenance ({ source: 'stage_capture', artifact_id, sha256, manifest_ref }) — proven by cargo test asserting the inserted NodeView is the MT-014 type and the provenance descriptor is present and matches the fetched artifact's sha256.

AC-004: When the embed-back endpoint GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/artifacts/{id} is absent (route missing / 404 / 501), fetch_stage_artifact returns StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent and the operator-facing typed blocker is raised — proven by cargo test with a client stub that reports the endpoint absent; NO backend route is added.

AC-005: The 'Route to Stage' command reuses (extends) MT-033's CKC route-to-Stage command surface rather than duplicating it; the embed-back leg is added on the Stage pane — proven by grep showing a single route-to-stage command id and the added embed-stage-capture command.

AC-006: StagePane registers into the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs) and AccessKit id registry (accessibility/registry.rs) with author_ids 'stage-pane' (GenericContainer), 'stage-capture-embed-back' (Button), 'stage-routed-content' (GenericContainer) — proven by AccessKit tree dump in kittest.

AC-007: No SQLite anywhere and no new src/backend/** route added — proven by grep (no sqlite/rusqlite references; no edits under src/backend/**); persistence is PostgreSQL/EventLedger via the existing handshake_core API only.
AC-008: cargo test -p handshake-native passes with no failures across all stage_interop tests in src/frontend/handshake_native/tests/test_stage_interop.rs.
proof_targets: PT-001: cargo test -p handshake-native route_to_stage -- --nocapture  =>  payload-shape tests PASS for selection and canvas node
PT-002: integration test (real PG): assert route_to_stage emits the MT-036 route_to_stage FR event and the Stage pane receives the content
PT-003: cargo test -p handshake-native embed_back -- --nocapture  =>  inserted NodeView is an MT-014 embed with SHA-256 provenance
PT-004: cargo test -p handshake-native embed_back_endpoint_absent  =>  StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent raised (typed blocker), no backend route added
PT-005: AccessKit tree snapshot: assert 'stage-pane', 'stage-capture-embed-back', 'stage-routed-content' present with correct roles
implementation_notes: Route via the EXISTING handshake_core endpoints only: POST /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/route (route-to-stage, already used by MT-033) and GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/artifacts/{id} (embed-back). Bind through the existing HandshakeClient (backend_client.rs); never add or modify a backend route.

Reuse MT-014's EmbedNodeView / embed-block type for embed-back; do not define a parallel embed type. The provenance descriptor must travel inside the NodeView so SHA-256 manifest provenance is durable.
Reuse MT-036's route_to_stage Flight-Recorder emitter signature exactly; do not introduce a new FR event kind.
Reuse MT-033's route-to-Stage command (extend it); the new code is the selection/canvas-node payload builders and the embed-back return leg, plus the StagePane host.

Read selection state from the WP-011 shared command/event bus (command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs) (TextRange / BlockRef / NodeRef); resolve target note/canvas pane via the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs, with canvas surfaces in canvas_board.rs) and the bus focus owner (event_bus.rs).

EmbedBackEndpointAbsent is the canonical typed blocker per the HARD no-backend-rewrite rule: detect endpoint absence (404/501/route-not-registered/client-method-missing) and surface it; never stub the artifact.
ProvenanceMissing guards evidence-grade integrity: if a fetched artifact lacks sha256 or manifest, refuse to embed rather than embedding an unverifiable capture.
PostgreSQL/EventLedger only — no SQLite, no rusqlite, anywhere in this MT.

Cross-WP dependency (prose, not a depends_on id): the WP-011 native shell primitives in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/ — pane_registry.rs, command_registry.rs, event_bus.rs, accessibility/registry.rs, backend_client.rs, canvas_board.rs — must already be present from WP-011; this MT reuses them and must not recreate them.

React reference: app/src/components/* Stage surface + MediaDownloaderView — study the capture/import data model and status-dispatch pattern; port the surface, not the transport (transport is the Rust HandshakeClient in backend_client.rs).

STAGE BACKEND ROUTES ABSENT -> ROUTE = MT-033 BUS COMMAND, EMBED-BACK = TYPED BLOCKER (KERNEL_BUILDER gate 2026-06-25, VERIFIED handshake_core grep): there are NO /stage/ HTTP routes in handshake_core (Stage = Pillar 17, like FEMS has no backend HTTP surface). The contract's 'POST /workspaces/{id}/stage/route (MT-033 uses it)' is WRONG - MT-033's route-to-Stage is a BUS COMMAND: interop/interaction_bus.rs CMD_ROUTE_TO_STAGE='interop.route-to-stage' + request_route_to_stage (the shell drains the staged content cross-pane), NOT a backend POST. SO: (1) route_to_stage EXTENDS the MT-033 bus command (interop.route-to-stage) - the cross-pane routing is via the InteractionBus, add the Selection + CanvasNode payload builders on top (do NOT duplicate the command id, AC-005/MC-003; do NOT assume/require a backend POST - if a stage/route backend POST is genuinely absent the routing stays bus-only, which is what MT-033 does). (2) embed-back GET /workspaces/{id}/stage/artifacts/{id} is ABSENT -> fetch_stage_artifact returns StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent (the TYPED BLOCKER, the contract's designed path; detection BROAD: 404/501/route-not-registered/client-method-missing, RISK-008/MC-008). NO backend route added (RISK-001/MC-001), NO SQLite.

REUSE MT-014 EMBED + SHA-256 PROVENANCE + FR-via-MT-036 (KERNEL_BUILDER gate): embed_artifact_as_nodeview REUSES the MT-014 EmbedNodeView / Child::HsLink embed atom (by ref_kind - the stage artifact embeds as an hsLink atom, ref_kind='stage_capture' or the existing image/video kind; do NOT define a parallel embed type, RISK-004/MC-004, AC-003). SHA-256 MANIFEST PROVENANCE MUST SURVIVE the conversion: the NodeView carries {source:'stage_capture', artifact_id, sha256, manifest_ref}; if the fetched artifact has NO sha256/manifest -> StageInteropError::ProvenanceMissing (REFUSE to embed an unverifiable evidence-grade capture, RISK-002/MC-002). route_to_stage emits the MT-036 route_to_stage FR event via the EXISTING MT-036 emitter (NO new event kind, RISK-005/MC-005) - NOTE the MT-036 closed-schema gap: the FR emit SHAPE is provable now but live native-editor FR ingestion is GATED (like MT-064). build_from_selection reads the MT-031 SharedSelection (TextRange->Selection, BlockRef->NoteRef, NodeRef->CanvasNode) off the bus; validate selection liveness vs pane_registry before routing + re-resolve the embed target at embed time (refuse a dangling pane, RISK-007/MC-007).

WIDGET-PROVABLE + LIVE-GATED + HYGIENE (KERNEL_BUILDER gate): PROVABLE NOW (fixtures/kittest): the payload builders (AC-001), embed_artifact_as_nodeview + SHA-256 provenance (AC-003), the EmbedBackEndpointAbsent typed blocker w/ a client-stub matrix (AC-004), ProvenanceMissing, the StagePane AccessKit (stage-pane GenericContainer / stage-capture-embed-back Button / stage-routed-content GenericContainer, AC-006), and the FR route_to_stage payload SHAPE. GATED #[ignore]+integration (NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF): AC-002's LIVE route round-trip (real PG + live FR ingestion - both gated). The StagePane registers in pane_registry (factory) now; the LIVE pane DOCK + the live route command wiring through the mounted shell = E11/MT-069. NO Color32 literal (theme); external screenshot if any; full suite -j 2 (serialize, build-lock); clippy clean; AC-007 grep no sqlite/rusqlite + no src/backend edit.
ports_from_react: app/src/components/* Stage surface + MediaDownloaderView (capture/import reference) — Stage surface layout, capture/import data model, status-dispatch pattern
binds_backend_api: GET /workspaces/{workspace_id}/stage/artifacts/{id} (embed-back; typed blocker StageInteropError::EmbedBackEndpointAbsent if absent — no backend route added)

risks: RISK-001: A coder may add a new src/backend/** route to implement embed-back instead of raising the typed blocker, violating the HARD no-backend-rewrite rule.
RISK-002: The embed-back NodeView may drop the SHA-256 manifest provenance during conversion, producing an unverifiable evidence-grade embed.
RISK-003: A coder may duplicate MT-033's route-to-Stage command rather than extending it, fragmenting the command surface and the 'melt-together' invariant.
RISK-004: A parallel embed type may be defined instead of reusing MT-014's EmbedNodeView, fragmenting the embed model.
RISK-005: A new Flight-Recorder event kind may be invented instead of reusing MT-036's route_to_stage emitter, breaking timeline correlation.
RISK-006: Integration tests may run against SQLite or an in-memory shim instead of the real PostgreSQL/EventLedger, hiding ledger-shape mismatches.
RISK-007: A stale/closed source pane_id in the SharedSelection may route an empty or dangling payload to Stage; the embed-back target pane may also be gone.

RISK-008: Endpoint-absence detection may be too narrow (only 404) and miss 501 / route-not-registered / missing client method, silently producing a wrong-shaped error instead of EmbedBackEndpointAbsent.
minimum_controls: MC-001: AC-004 + AC-007 enforce the typed blocker and forbid any src/backend/** edit; grep gate on src/backend/** must show no changes.
MC-002: AC-003 + ProvenanceMissing guard enforce SHA-256 manifest provenance survives into the NodeView; refuse to embed unverifiable artifacts.
MC-003: AC-005 grep gate enforces a single route-to-stage command id (extend MT-033, do not duplicate).
MC-004: AC-003 asserts the inserted NodeView is the MT-014 embed type, not a parallel type.
MC-005: route_to_stage must call MT-036's existing emitter; AC-002 reads the FR event from the ledger to confirm the canonical event kind.
MC-006: AC-002 + AC-007 require integration tests against a real PostgreSQL/EventLedger and forbid SQLite anywhere (grep gate on sqlite/rusqlite).
MC-007: Payload builders validate selection liveness against the WP-011 pane registry (pane_registry.rs) before routing; embed target is re-resolved at embed time and refuses a dangling pane.
MC-008: EmbedBackEndpointAbsent detection covers 404, 501, route-not-registered, and missing client method — proven by AC-004's client stub matrix.

research_provenance.source: KERNEL_BUILDER gate + VERIFIED handshake_core (NO /stage/ routes) + MT-033 interop.route-to-stage bus command (interaction_bus.rs CMD_ROUTE_TO_STAGE) + MT-014 EmbedNodeView + MT-036 FR emitter (closed schema) + MT-031 SharedSelection
corrections: Stage has NO backend HTTP routes -> route_to_stage EXTENDS the MT-033 bus command (interop.route-to-stage, not a backend POST); embed-back GET /stage/artifacts absent -> EmbedBackEndpointAbsent typed blocker (broad 404/501/route-not-registered/client-missing)
reuse MT-014 EmbedNodeView (hsLink atom by ref_kind) - no parallel embed type; SHA-256 manifest provenance survives + ProvenanceMissing guard (refuse unverifiable)
FR via MT-036 route_to_stage emitter (closed-schema -> shape-provable, live ingestion gated); read MT-031 SharedSelection off bus; validate selection liveness + re-resolve embed target
widget-provable now (builders/embed/provenance/typed-blocker/accesskit/FR-shape) + AC-002 live round-trip gated + dock at E11; no backend/SQLite/Color32; -j 2

implementation_result.implemented_by: KERNEL_BUILDER folded pipeline wf_cfe4708a (impl + 3-lens panel; ALL PASS - no harden)
commits: 99e8ddb7 feat MT-066 bidirectional Stage interop (route builders + embed-back typed blocker)
implementation_result.review_panel: correctness=PASS(0), backend-shape=PASS(0), perf-focus-hygiene=PASS(0) -> ALL PASS, zero must-fixes (7th clean all-PASS MT).
implementation_result.proofs: AC-001..008 + PT-001..005 PASS (AC-002/PT-002 PARTIAL_GATED); 10 unit + 12 integration (1 gated) + 23 lib + 24 regression green; clippy clean; Stage pane (routed content 'Selection from pane-rich:0-16: routed selection' + 'Capture/Embed back' button) visually verified - bidirectional Stage interop; screenshot EXTERNAL.
implementation_result.stage_routes_absent_CONFIRMED: VERIFIED handshake_core has NO /stage/ HTTP routes. So: route_to_stage EXTENDS the MT-033 bus command (interop.route-to-stage, NOT a backend POST - the InteractionBus stages content cross-pane); embed-back GET /stage/artifacts/{id} is ABSENT -> EmbedBackEndpointAbsent typed blocker (BROAD detection: 404 AND 501 proven via mock TcpListener; no fake artifact, no backend route). Joins the FEMS/Stage no-HTTP-surface pattern.
implementation_result.steers_held: reuse MT-014 EmbedNodeView (HsLinkNode ref_kind=stage_capture) + StageEmbedProvenance {source:stage_capture, artifact_id, sha256, manifest_ref} - NO parallel embed type; SHA-256 manifest provenance SURVIVES + ProvenanceMissing guard (refuse unverifiable). FR via the MT-036 route_to_stage emitter (NO new event kind; shape proven, live ingestion gated). single route command id (MT-033 reused, NOT duplicated) + interop.embed-stage-capture added. read MT-031 SharedSelection off bus (TextRange->Selection/BlockRef->NoteRef/NodeRef->CanvasNode) + selection-liveness validate + embed-target re-resolve. accesskit stage-pane/stage-routed-content/stage-capture-embed-back. no backend/SQLite (GET-only embed-back, AC-007 grep).
implementation_result.carried_E11: AC-002 LIVE route round-trip (real PG + live native-editor FR ingestion) #[ignore]'d NEEDS_MANAGED_RESOURCE_PROOF (both gated - the FR closed-schema gap + no managed PG). The StagePane registers in pane_registry now; the live pane DOCK + live route-command wiring through the mounted shell = E11/MT-069.
implementation_result.waiver_granted: interop/stage_interop.rs (new) + interop/mod.rs + interop/interaction_bus.rs (CMD_EMBED_STAGE_CAPTURE) + stage_pane.rs (new) + lib.rs + pane_registry.rs + command_registry.rs + test in allowed_paths.
